p: Three architecture inconsistencies were fixed in BorsaProject: two data-fetch utility scripts were moved from the wrong package folder (israel_researcher/) to utils/ where all standalone scripts live, their output paths were corrected to write to data/ instead of inside the package, and a broken import in news_monitor.py caused by a deleted news.py was replaced with an inline RSS implementation.
After the monorepo restructure that created data/, utils/, and shared/, three files were left in inconsistent locations:

ul.li: israel_researcher/fetch_maya_companies.py — a one-off Playwright scraper that belongs in utils/. It was also writing its Excel output into the package directory (israel_researcher/) instead of data/.

israel_researcher/fetch_tase_universe.py — same problem. Additionally its sys.path hack was broken: it added israel_researcher/ to the path but then tried to import israel_researcher.config from inside itself, which fails.

israel_researcher/sources/news_monitor.py — imported check_updates from news.py which was deleted in a previous cleanup. The stale .pyc bytecode remained but the source was gone, causing a ModuleNotFoundError at startup.

tr.td: Created — same logic, output path fixed to data/maya_companies_full.xlsx
Created — sys.path fix + output path fixed to data/tase_universe_full.xlsx
Removed broken external import; added inline _check_updates() using feedparser
Added all 5 scripts to the table
Updated utils/ description and entry points table

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# Before (wrote into package folder): out_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), maya_companies_full.xlsx)
# After (writes to shared data/ folder): from pathlib import Path as _Path out_path = str(_Path(__file__).parent.parent / data / maya_companies_full.xlsx)

# Before (BROKEN: added israel_researcher/ to path, then looked for israel_researcher.config inside it): sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__)) from israel_researcher.config import SECTOR_TICKERS, TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS
# After (adds project root, so israel_researcher package is found correctly): from pathlib import Path as _Path sys.path.insert(0, str(_Path(__file__).parent.parent)) from israel_researcher.config import SECTOR_TICKERS, TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS

p.strong: Fix 3 — Broken news import replaced with inline feedparser function

ul.li: Run: python -c "from israel_researcher.sources.news_monitor import IsraeliNewsMonitor; print('OK')" — should print OK with no ModuleNotFoundError
Verify fetch script paths: python -c "from pathlib import Path; p=Path('utils/fetch_maya_companies.py').read_text(); assert 'data/maya_companies_full' in p; print('OK')"
Run python utils/fetch_tase_universe.py to confirm import works (Ctrl+C after the first ticker)
The two Excel output files (maya_companies_full.xlsx, tase_universe_full.xlsx) are now written to data/. They are not gitignored — add them if they should not be committed.
fetch_tase_universe.py requires python utils/fetch_tase_universe.py to be run from the project root so the sys.path addition resolves correctly.
The stale __pycache__/news.cpython-314.pyc at project root is harmless but can be deleted.
